Tax refund


New Zealand Taxation Office has calculated your tax return, you are entitled to a tax refund of 634.13 NZD. The GOVT has attempted to transfer the amount to your account. Unfortunately we were unable to confirm your current account number.

Select your current bank and follow the steps of your relevant bank.

You may be asked to make a payment of 0.01 NZD to verify your cardnumber.
